name: The War Atlas — Open Dataset
description: Structured facts from The War Atlas battles catalogue: battles with dates, coordinates (with precision provenance), results, source-cited force-strength and casualty ranges, wars, commanders, factions, and source references. Contains structured data only — harvested Wikipedia prose (CC BY-SA) is deliberately excluded so the compilation can be licensed CC BY 4.0.

license.name: CC BY 4.0
license.notes: Free to share and adapt with attribution. Please credit 'The War Atlas — thewaratlas.co' and link to https://thewaratlas.co. Underlying facts are largely derived from Wikidata (CC0); the compilation, selection, and curation are licensed CC BY 4.0.

citation: The War Atlas (2026). The War Atlas Open Dataset (version 2026-07-03). https://thewaratlas.co/data
